falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would confirm a market top, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Nasdaq 100 breaks below its 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp bearish breakout would indicate a confirmed downtrend, falsifying the HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict wrong.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
